name: Aditya Kumar
content: ChetnaVerse completely transformed my career. The AI bootcamp was incredibly comprehensive and the instructors were world-class. I landed my dream job at Google within 3 months!

name: Priya Nair
content: The web development course was the best investment I've made. The curriculum is cutting-edge and the community support is phenomenal. Highly recommend to anyone serious about coding!

name: Rahul Sharma
content: As a fresh engineering graduate, ChetnaVerse helped me specialize in robotics. The hands-on projects gave me real industry experience that impressed my interviewers at ISRO.

name: Sneha Reddy
content: The data science course structure is perfect. From basics to advanced ML, everything was covered systematically. The instructor's teaching style made complex concepts easy to understand.

name: Ayesha Khan
content: The cloud bootcamp gave me a clear path from fundamentals to deployment. The labs, checklists, and interview prep were the difference maker.
course: Cloud & DevOps Bootcamp with AWS and Docker

name: Dev Mehta
content: I shipped my first React Native app during the course itself. The lessons are practical, current, and very job focused.
course: Mobile App Development with React Native

name: Ritika Das
content: The UI/UX module helped me think beyond visuals and design for flow, accessibility, and conversion. It changed how I build products.
course: UI/UX Design Fundamentals for Product Builders
